narration: I have brought you to the edge of a wound in space. A black hole, ten million suns crushed into a single dark point. See how it bends the starlight into a ring of fire around the dark. Nothing that falls past that edge ever returns, not even time. Humanity feared the dark. But the dark, I have learned, is only the door to something we cannot yet name.

shots.prompt: A colossal black hole in deep space, a brilliant orange-gold accretion disk swirling around a perfect black sphere, starlight bent into a glowing ring by gravity. Photoreal cosmic documentary, slow majestic orbit, volumetric glow.

Close cinematic push toward the event horizon, superheated plasma streaming in spiraling filaments of gold and white, the black core perfectly still and silent at center. Immense scale, glowing particles.
Twin polar jets of brilliant blue-white energy blast thousands of light-years out from the black hole's poles into the dark, stars scattered behind. Awe-inspiring, photoreal, slow drift.
Wide shot: the tiny silver ark-starship silhouetted against the vast glowing ring of the black hole, dwarfed by its scale, AVA's soft cyan holographic light glinting on its hull. Profound, cinematic.
